tuning: E A D G B E
content:
"King Of Anything"
Sara Bareilles
Kaleidoscope Heart
Submitted by : twitter.com/larnsriver

[tab]Key: [ch]E[/ch]
Tuning: Standard EADGBe[/tab]

I've been looking for the guitar chords of this song since
Sara Bareilles twittered about it, but wasn't lucky to find
one. So, I decided to do it myself and share it with you guys.
Just remember, you got it here first. -- Larns XO


[tab][ch]C#[/ch]     [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]
Oh oh oh oh oh oh oh oh[/tab]

[tab][ch]C#[/ch]                              [ch]F#m[/ch]
  Keep drinking coffee, stare me down across the table[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
  While I look outside[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]                          [ch]F#m[/ch]
  So many things I'd say if only I were able[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bbm[/ch]                           [ch]F#m[/ch]
  But I just keep quiet and count the cars that pass by[/tab]

[tab][ch]C#[/ch]
  You've got opinions man[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
  We're all entitled to 'em[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]
  But I never asked[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C#[/ch]
  So let me thank you for your time[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F#m[/ch]
  And try not to waste any more of mine[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]               [ch]F#m[/ch]
  Get out of here fast[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]G#[/ch]
  I hate to break it to you babe[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bbm[/ch]
  But I'm not drowning[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]G#[/ch]
  There's no one here to save[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]
  Who cares if you disagree[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C#[/ch]
  You are not me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G#[/ch]
  Who made you king of anything[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bbm[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
  So you dare tell me who to be[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C#[/ch]               [ch]G#[/ch]
  Who died and made you king of anything[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]C#[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]Bbm[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]
  Ooh ooh oh[/tab]

[tab](Do same chords: [ch]C#[/ch]-[ch]F#m[/ch]-[ch]Bbm[/ch]-F#m)
  You sound so innocent[/tab]
  All full of good intent
  Swear you know best
  But you expect me to
  Jump up on board with you
  And ride off into your delusional sunset

[tab] (Do same chords: [ch]C#[/ch]-[ch]F#m[/ch]-[ch]Bbm[/ch]-F#m)
  I'm not the one who's lost[/tab]
  With no direction, oh
  But you'll never see 
  You're so busy making maps
  With my name on them in all caps
  You got the talking down
  Just not the listening

[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]
  Who cares if you disagree[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C#[/ch]
  You are not me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G#[/ch]
  Who made you king of anything[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bbm[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
  So you dare tell me who to be[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C#[/ch]               [ch]G#[/ch]
  Who died and made you king of anything[/tab]

[tab]     [ch]G#[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]
  All my life I've tried[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bbm[/ch]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
  To make everybody happy while I[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G#[/ch]      [ch]F#m[/ch]
  Just hurt and hide[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G#[/ch]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]C#[/ch]-[ch]F#m[/ch]-[ch]Bbm[/ch]-[ch]F#m[/ch]
  Waiting for someone to tell me it's my turn to decide[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]
  Who cares if you disagree[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C#[/ch]
  You are not me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G#[/ch]
  Who made you king of anything[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bbm[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
  So you dare tell me who to be[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C#[/ch]               [ch]G#[/ch]
  Who died and made you king of anything[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]
  Who cares if you disagree[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C#[/ch]
  You are not me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G#[/ch]
  Who made you king of anything[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bbm[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
  So you dare tell me who to be[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C#[/ch]               [ch]G#[/ch]
  Who died and made you king of anything[/tab]

[tab] [ch]C#[/ch]                    [ch]F#m[/ch]  
  Lemme hold your crown, babe[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bbm[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]
  oh oh oh oh[/tab]
